# Template Maintenance Docs

This folder contains documentation about how the
starter template itself was built and maintained.

**These files are NOT relevant when building a new
app from this template. Safe to ignore.**

## Contents

- **DECISIONS.md** — Architecture and technology decisions
  made while building and evolving the template.
  Explains why things are the way they are.
- **MAINTENANCE.md** — Full template status, phase history,
  improvement roadmap, and how to work on the template.

## For template maintainers
When upgrading gems, Ruby, or Tailwind in the template
itself, document the decision in DECISIONS.md with:
- Date
- What changed
- Why
- Any gotchas encountered
